executable_users.description: A list of AWS account IDs that have permission to launch the specified AMI.

include_deprecated.description: A boolean value that indicates whether to include deprecated AMIs in the search results.

name_regex.description: A regular expression to filter AMI names, allowing only those that match the pattern.

owners.description: A list of owner IDs or aliases to filter AMIs, only AMIs owned by these accounts will be considered.

sort_ascending.description: A boolean value that determines the sort order of the AMIs; true for ascending and false for descending.
